title: The Dance of the Dragons: When Fire Turned on Itself #got #shorts
description: The Targaryens were never defeated by enemies—they destroyed themselves. The Dance of the Dragons was a civil war that turned dragon against dragon, leaving the empire broken forever. #DanceOfTheDragons #Targaryen #GameOfThrones #Shorts

scenes.narration: The Targaryens were not destroyed by outsiders—they were destroyed when fire turned against itself.
scenes.image_prompt: two dragons facing each other in a storm, lightning and fire clashing, dark fantasy, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: After generations of rule, the greatest threat to the Targaryens became their own bloodline.
scenes.image_prompt: Targaryen family divided into opposing factions, tension and rivalry, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: A dispute over succession split the realm, turning allies into enemies and heirs into rivals.
scenes.image_prompt: two claimants facing each other with armies behind them, symbolic division, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Rhaenyra and Aegon each claimed the throne, and neither side was willing to yield.
scenes.image_prompt: Rhaenyra and Aegon II facing off with dragons behind them, intense confrontation, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: What began as politics quickly became war, as dragons took to the skies against their own kind.
scenes.image_prompt: multiple dragons clashing mid-air in fiery combat, epic chaos, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Cities burned, armies vanished, and the sky itself became a battlefield of fire and death.
scenes.image_prompt: city engulfed in dragonfire while dragons battle above, apocalyptic scene, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: For the first time, dragons were no longer symbols of power—but casualties of it.
scenes.image_prompt: fallen dragon on battlefield, lifeless and massive, tragic tone, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The war consumed the Targaryens from within, leaving no true victor, only loss and ruin.
scenes.image_prompt: ruined throne room with broken banners and ash, aftermath of destruction, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: By the end, most dragons were dead, and the power that built the empire was gone forever.
scenes.image_prompt: empty dragon pit with silence and decay, symbolic extinction, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The Dance of the Dragons did not end the Targaryens—but it ensured they would never rule the same way again.
scenes.image_prompt: Iron Throne standing alone in dim light, no dragons in sight, somber ending, vertical 1080x1920
